_doc: Stage 11 input contract for identity gating to consensus. Validated against executeConsensusPhase() and runConsensusEngine() on 2026-03-17.
producer: Per-source records after stage 10 identity and anchor filtering
pre_consensus_filtering: Only sources labeled matched or possible enter consensus.
Major anchor conflicts exclude the source.
Discovery-only rows stay out of late-stage consensus.
Identity lock seeds id, brand, model, base_model, category, and sku before candidate clustering.
core_transforms: Canonicalize candidate values per field before clustering.
Cluster rows by normalized value key.
Score clusters with tier weight x method weight.
Apply selection_policy bonus when field rules define one.
Apply strict, relaxed, or instrumented acceptance logic before writing the field value.
